sent_simp: 他因性侵未成年人被判入狱。
sent_trad: 他因性侵未成年人被判入獄。
pinyin: Tā yīn xìngqīn wèichéngnián rén bèi pàn rùyù.
english: He was sentenced to prison for sexually assaulting a minor.

sent_simp: 站在山顶，眼前是无边的草原。
sent_trad: 站在山頂，眼前是無邊的草原。
pinyin: Zhàn zài shāndǐng, yǎnqián shì wúbiān de cǎoyuán.
english: Standing on the mountaintop, a boundless grassland stretches before your eyes.

sent_simp: 这条隧道贯通了南北两个城区。
sent_trad: 這條隧道貫通了南北兩個城區。
pinyin: Zhè tiáo suìdào guàntōng le nán-běi liǎng gè chéngqū.
english: This tunnel links the northern and southern districts of the city.

sent_simp: 这个游乐区是专门为幼童设计的。
sent_trad: 這個遊樂區是專門為幼童設計的。
pinyin: Zhège yóulè qū shì zhuānmén wèi yòutóng shèjì de.
english: This play area is specially designed for young children.

sent_simp: 老师奖赏了表现优秀的学生。
sent_trad: 老師獎賞了表現優秀的學生。
pinyin: Lǎoshī jiǎngshǎng le biǎoxiàn yōuxiù de xuésheng.
english: The teacher rewarded the students who performed excellently.

sent_simp: 盖这座宅子花了他不少银子。
sent_trad: 蓋這座宅子花了他不少銀子。
pinyin: Gài zhè zuò zhái zi huā le tā bù shǎo yínzi.
english: Building this house cost him a lot of silver (money).
